title: python: fix Node Meshtastic adapter import and typing
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-1ox2 with mypy, python/src/lichen/node.py failed because it imports lichen.meshtastic.adapter, but the adapter implementation is under lichen/interface/meshtastic/adapter.py, and _meshtastic_adapter is typed as object so mypy rejects start()/stop() calls. What needs to be done: decide the intended public import path for the Meshtastic adapter, update Node's lazy import and type annotation/protocol accordingly, and add or update tests so mypy can check node.py without these import/attr-defined errors.
close_reason: Completed: fixed Node's Meshtastic lazy import path to lichen.interface.meshtastic.adapter, typed the optional adapter through a lifecycle Protocol, and added async start/stop hooks to MeshtasticAdapter with focused lifecycle test coverage. Tests/checks: uv run python -m pytest tests/interface/meshtastic/test_adapter.py; uv run python -m ruff check touched files; uv run python -m mypy src/lichen/node.py --disable-error-code type-arg; git diff --check. Full mypy on node.py now has only unrelated strict type-arg errors, tracked as follow-up project-LICHEN-7ax6. Review pass 1: no findings; diff scoped to import path, adapter lifecycle typing/hooks, and test. Review pass 2: no findings.
